text: In today's video, you will learn some ways of making your beard grow faster.
We have already taught you many different ways of accelerating your hair growth.
But, what can men do to make their beard grow faster and fuller?
Today, the trend is for men to have long, full beards with big sideburns.
In the past decades, it has become important for men to express their masculinity through their beards.
Not to mention the growth in the number of specialized barbershops around the world.
Are you part of the legion of bearded men?
Or do you know a man who loves to take care of his beard?
If you haven't joined this trend yet because your facial hair is short or takes too long to grow, we brought you some completely natural recipes to help you grow a nice beard.
Do you want to learn how?
Peppermint essential oil To stimulate hair growth with peppermint oil, mix 2 drops of this oil with a tablespoon of a carrier oil, like jojoba or coconut oil.
Apply it daily over your beard and let it act for at least 30 minutes (before starting this treatment, apply some of the oil on your forearm to make sure you won't have any skin reaction).
Be careful not to let the oil reach your eyes.
Eucalyptus essential oil Did you know that eucalyptus oil stimulates hair growth and can help you grow a nice beard?
Mix 5 drops of eucalyptus oil with 5 ounces of water and apply over your beard.
Let it act for 20 minutes, then rinse.
Apply every other day, and your beard will start growing.
Enjoying the video?
Then give it a like and share it with your friends to help the channel!
Self-massage Did you know that massages stimulate beard growth?
That's right!
Massaging your skin accelerates blood circulation and contributes to hair growth.
Massage your beard with circular, up-to-down motions.
If you want, you can apply a few drops of one of the oils we mentioned before to ease the movements.
Massage your face for 15 minutes, then rinse to remove the oil.
Exfoliate your skin Did you know that exfoliating the skin prevents the buildup of dead skin cells in your pores and helps your hair grow?
Exfoliate 1 or 2 times a week during the night.
You can buy a natural exfoliator, or make your own, as we taught in this video.
Don't forget to always moisturize your skin after exfoliating it.
So, did you like these tips?
Have you heard any of them before?
Try them and share your experience with us.
